---
title: "test_effective_curves"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/test_effective_curves.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_effective_curves.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `test_get_m_eff_log_constant_mass` {#test_get_m_eff_log_constant_mass}

```python
def test_get_m_eff_log_constant_mass()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_effective_curves.py#L14){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_get_m_eff_strategy_invalid` {#test_get_m_eff_strategy_invalid}

```python
def test_get_m_eff_strategy_invalid()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_effective_curves.py#L26){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_fit_eff_mass_returns_float` {#test_fit_eff_mass_returns_float}

```python
def test_fit_eff_mass_returns_float()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_effective_curves.py#L34){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
